headline: The Bull Case For LKQ (LKQ) Could Change Following FinishMaster Integration And Mega-Yard Expansion Plans
summary: LKQ Corporation recently reported that it overcame a difficult 2024 by emphasizing operational excellence, completing the FinishMaster integration ahead of schedule, and delivering record EBITDA margins in its European segment while continuing to return cash to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases. An interesting angle is LKQ's 2025 plan to open new mega-yards to boost productivity, paired with guidance for adjusted diluted EPS between US$3.40 and US$3.70, signaling how its...
